stemHtml:
What is the reason for this special air report to be issued?

“VA812 TRS OBS 1210Z”

options.a: Tropical revolving storm (TRS) was observed, with severe turbulence reported near its center.
options.b: Volcanic ash-cloud observed with ashfall reported below FL200.
options.c: Volcanic ash-cloud observed above FL200, requiring deviation.
options.d: A tropical revolving storm (TRS) was observed at 1210 UTC.
